ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tollgates" (
  "tollgate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toll gate */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the toll gate */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the toll gate */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of toll gate installation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the toll gate location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the toll gate location */,
  "toll_rate" REAL /* Toll rate for the gate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tollgate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "vehicle_length" REAL /* Length of the vehicle in meters */,
  "vehicle_height" REAL /* Height of the vehicle in meters */,
  "vehicle_weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle classification */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "length_range" TEXT /* Length range of the vehicle classification */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range of the vehicle classification */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range of the vehicle classification */,
  "toll_rate_multiplier" REAL /* Toll rate multiplier for the vehicle classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toll_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each toll record */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of vehicle passage */,
  "tollgate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the toll gate */,
  "direction" INTEGER /* Direction of the vehicle (0 for entering, 1 for exiting) */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "has_etc" INTEGER /* Indicator if the vehicle has an ETC device (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toll_records_tollgate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tollgate_id") REFERENCES tollgates ("tollgate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toll_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toll_records_direction FOREIGN KEY ("direction") REFERENCES directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toll_records_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the direction (e.g., Entry, Exit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etc_devices" (
  "etc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETC device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of ETC device (e.g., transponder, sticker) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toll_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the toll record associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the toll */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toll_payments_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES toll_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_etc_devices" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "etc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ETC device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "etc_id")
)
